name: Cascadia Minerals Ltd.
description: Cascadia Minerals Ltd. is a Canadian junior mineral exploration company focused on making copper and gold discoveries in Yukon and British Columbia. The company's flagship property is the Catch Property in central Yukon, which hosts a newly discovered copper-gold porphyry system. Cascadia also holds the Sands of Time, Rosalie, and PIL properties, leveraging an experienced management team and advanced exploration techniques to create shareholder value.
